C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT. 218, RFLAGEOLLET, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; PHEARD, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY BTHOMPSON, ESQ. AND DEF ADEENA BROWN DID NOT APPEAR. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. COURT AWARDS DEFAULT JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLNTF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AND AGAINST DEF ADEENA BROWN, GRANTING POSSESSION OF PREMISES SITUATED AT 136 KISKA ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA TOGETHER WITH DAMAGES OF $340.60 AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ADEENA (ADENNA) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 136 KISKA ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $340.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00, LEASE FORFEITED
